    தமிழ்
    English
    Error translating content. Please try again later.
    Blooms Dental Care (also known as Blooms Dental Clinic) is a highly-rated multispeciality clinic in Bengaluru. They offer comprehensive oral care, ranging from routine checkups to advanced cosmetic and implantology services. 
    Locations & Contact 
    They operate two primary branches in Bengaluru to serve different parts of the city: 
    1. Madiwala / BTM Layout Branch 
    • Address: No. 9, 1st Floor, 1st Main Road, Maruthi Nagar, Madiwala, BTM 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560068 (Opposite Colours Boutique)
    • Hours: Monday to Saturday: 10:00 AM – 9:00 PM | Sunday: 12:00 PM – 9:00 PM
    • Phone: +91 70125 90484
    • Profile: View appointments on Practo or Justdial. 
    2. Koramangala Branch 
    • Address: No. 1010, First Floor, 7th A Main Road, S.T. Bed, 1st Block Koramangala, Extension, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560034 (Above Apollo Pharmacy)
    • Hours: Open daily until 8:00 PM
    • Phone: +91 80 4725 3110 (or check directly on Justdial) 
    Core Services 
    The clinic specializes in a variety of dental treatments, including: 
    • Cosmetic Dentistry: Teeth whitening, cosmetic gum treatments, and veneers
    • General Dentistry: Routine cleaning, fillings, and root canals
    • Advanced Procedures: Oral radiology, implants, and orthodontics
